features.name: reg variable with procedural assignment in always @*
features.description: Code should include a reg variable being assigned through procedural statements inside an always @* procedural block

features.name: casez statement in always @* block
features.description: Code should include a casez statement inside an always @* block with conditional assignments to a reg variable

features.name: procedural vs continuous assignment equivalence
features.description: Code should include the same combinational logic expressed both as reg with always @* procedural assignment and as wire with continuous assign, to test behavioral equivalence
